title: Assistant Store Manager - Nerolac Select Capital India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Nerolac Select Capital India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Nerolac Select Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Nerolac Select Capital India:
Nerolac Select Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nerolac Select Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
